accurate.why: Accurately describes the disapproval resolution; the description of the rule (requiring data collection) and the Texas court order are accurate real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: The description of the rule's requirements (financial institutions collect and report credit application data) and the court order are accurate real-world context verifiable independently.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as nullifying the CFPB's small business lending rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Implies the disapproval mechanism by noting the rule is nullified.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: No specific effective dates beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the operative provision (nullification) and adds useful context about what the rule does.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and the Equal Credit Opportunity Act.

correct_figures.why: May 31, 2023 publication date and July 31, 2023 court order date are accurate.
